goal: Fold 4 separate render-blocking CSS files into styles.css to cut roundtrips and simplify the asset graph
done: Concatenated bottom-nav.css + theme-tokens.css + phase-2-header.css + phase-2-1-logo.css into styles.css preserving cascade order; deleted the 4 source files; removed 37 link tags from 13 canonical HTML pages; rewrote phase-2-header bottom-nav specificity comment to drop file-path references; stripped 3 absorbed file-header docblocks inside styles.css; updated phase-1-home.css REQUIRES comment
symptom: 5 render-blocking CSS link tags per page (styles.css + theme-tokens + phase-2-header + phase-2-1-logo + phase-1-home) plus an @import inside styles.css for bottom-nav.css — extra roundtrips and module-graph noise
root_cause: Phase-by-phase CSS additions were shipped as separate files for review clarity; never re-consolidated after acceptance
fix: Single-file fold preserving the original cascade (bottom-nav → styles body → theme-tokens → phase-2-header → phase-2-1-logo) with phase-1-home.css remaining a separate link
affects: all canonical pages site-wide on first paint
verified: styles.css line count 8160 -> 8489 (net +329 lines from absorbed CSS minus stripped docblocks)
sample HTML head spot-checked on index.html
notes: Canonical-source only — www/ and ios/ mirrors deferred to user's cp + cap sync workflow. Source-file deletion is intentional to prevent future devs from editing orphan files. Card-suit pages (tarot-card-meanings/{cups,wands,swords,pentacles,major}.html) only ever linked styles.css — not affected. Cards/<slug>/index.html pages also only link styles.css. Cascade preserved by source order within the concatenated styles.css; intra-file order = HTML link order from before.
